name: Fluffy Bran Pancakes or Waffle Mix
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup millet flour (ground to make flour)
1/2 cup rice flour (ground to make flour)
recipeInstructions:
For the mix:
1. Stir all ingredients together until well mixed and smooth.
2. Store, tightly sealed, in the refrigerator.
For a batch of pancakes or waffles:
1. Mix all ingredients for pancakes/waffles together until well combined and smooth.
2. Make the pancakes small, about 3 inches in diameter, as they can be turned more easily.
